theme: Dark and Light Mode (Persisted to localStorage)

typography.heading: DM Serif Display, serif
typography.rules: Use tight letter spacing (tracking-tight) for all headings above text-3xl. Never use bold if DM Serif naturally lacks it. Body text must use leading-relaxed for optimal readability.

colors.description: Teal-forward palette with Fuchsia accent. Full light/dark theme via CSS variables + Tailwind semantic tokens. The dark mode uses deep rich teal-black backgrounds to feel modern and tech-focused.

visual enhancers.shadows: Soft shadows. Use shadow-xl shadow-teal-900/5 for light mode cards. Use deep shadow-black/40 for dark mode.
visual enhancers.radii: Generous rounded corners. Cards and major components MUST use rounded-2xl.
visual enhancers.glassmorphism: Mandatory for Sticky Navbar: backdrop-blur-xl bg-background/80 with a 1px bottom border. DO NOT use completely transparent backgrounds for the navbar.

grids.features: Bento Grid Protocol (Mode A - Tetris Grid). grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 with wide gaps (gap-8). Mix col-span-4 and col-span-8 to create intentional asymmetry.

layouts.spacing: Generous spacing. Use p-8 to p-16 for containers. Containers with borders MUST have internal padding.
layouts.hero: Split layout or Asymmetrical text-heavy left with a floating product visual on the right. Dark mode hero can use the abstract neon lines image as a subtle background accent.
layouts.pricing: 3-column grid. Highlight the Pro tier using a 'Tracing Beam' glowing border (fuchsia/teal) and an elevated scale (scale-105 on large screens).
layouts.footer: Multi-column layout, deep dark background. Large typography for brand name.

motion.framer_motion: Stagger children on scroll. Hover states with translate-y-[-2px] or scale-[1.02] for buttons and cards.
motion.transitions: Add transitions specifically to transform, opacity, and colors. Do not use 'transition-all'.

accessibility.contrast: Ensure text over buttons meets 4.5:1 ratio. White text on Teal and Fuchsia buttons.
accessibility.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, toggles, form inputs) MUST have data-testid attributes.
accessibility.focus: focus:ring-2 focus:ring-accent focus:outline-none for keyboard navigation.

media.rules: Images must never exceed 80vh on mobile. Max overlay opacity bg-black/40 for hero images.
media.icons: Use lucide-react. Keep stroke width consistent.

3d libraries.usage: Not strictly required for this scope, but Framer Motion can simulate 2.5D depth on pricing cards.

image_urls.description: Modern desk setup to imply workflow automation in action.
Abstract neon lines in purple (fuchsia) and teal. Excellent for dark mode visual flair.
Diverse team collaborating. Use in the Contact section to humanize the product.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. Project uses .js/.jsx files, NOT .tsx. All components must be written in modern React JavaScript.
2. Setup Tailwind with provided CSS variables for HSL colors. Extend colors in tailwind.config.js for primary and accent.
3. Implement the light/dark mode toggle using a global state or class strategy on the HTML element, persisted to localStorage.
4. Add fonts DM Serif Display and DM Sans via Google Fonts or npm, map them in Tailwind config.
6. Use Shadcn components for complex interactions, but heavily customize borders (rounded-2xl) and colors.
7. Build the specific sections: Hero, Features (Bento Grid), Pricing (3-tiers with Pro highlighted), and Contact Form (MongoDB persistence logic must be wired up to the backend/API calls).
UNIVERSAL GUIDELINES FOR MAIN AGENT: Do not converge toward generic outputs. Make creative, distinctive frontends that surprise and delight.
Do not use dark colors as gradients. Use solid colors with distinct hierarchy.
Create depth through layered design elements (z-index) and glass-morphism (backdrop-blur-xl).
Do not apply `transition: all`. Target specific properties.
Do not center-align the app container (`.App { text-align: center; }` is forbidden).
Always use modern button styles (rounded-xl) with interaction animations and Fuchsia or Teal colors.
Never use placeholder AI emojis for icons; use actual SVG icons (lucide-react).
Use 2-3x more spacing than feels comfortable (p-8 to p-16).
All interactive elements MUST have a data-testid attribute.
Always use the provided `image_urls`. Missing images lead to forbidden placeholder text.
